name: Shiki
when_to_use: 需要 TextMate 文法与 VS Code 主题级高亮精度时用它,而非手写 token span——原生手写在嵌套文法、语义作用域和主题映射上会失败。非做可编辑代码编辑器或代码执行器;普通高亮优先更轻的 Prism。
why_valuable: AI 默认做不到 TextMate scope 级 tokenization 和 VS Code 主题映射;Shiki 把高精度结果预渲成带 inline style 的静态 HTML,消费端无需持续运行高亮器。

schema.lang?: string(Shiki bundled language id,如 'typescript'|'python'|'json'|'text') —— 默认 'text'
schema.theme?: string(Shiki bundled theme id,如 'github-dark'|'github-light'|'nord'|'monokai') —— 默认 'github-dark'

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need TextMate grammar and VS Code theme-level highlighting accuracy instead of hand-written token spans, which tend to fail at nested grammars, semantic scopes, and theme mapping. It is not an editable code editor or code runner; for ordinary highlighting, prefer the lighter Prism.
en.why_valuable: AI cannot reproduce TextMate-scope tokenization and VS Code theme mapping. Shiki prerenders high-fidelity output as static HTML with inline styles, so the consumer does not need to keep a highlighter running.

schema.lang?: string (Shiki bundled language id, such as 'typescript'|'python'|'json'|'text') -- default 'text'
schema.theme?: string (Shiki bundled theme id, such as 'github-dark'|'github-light'|'nord'|'monokai') -- default 'github-dark'

carriers.artifact: inferred-not-tested:依赖 WebAssembly 能力,须待 H0 wasm 探针闭合
carriers.widget: conditional:宿主 CSP/能力必须允许 WebAssembly;HTML/CSS 本身可完全落 shadow
carriers.codex: conditional:sandbox 必须允许 WebAssembly 编译和 jsDelivr ESM 依赖链

isolation.evidence: Verified vs jsDelivr @4.3.1: named export `u as codeToHtml` (import { codeToHtml } correct); signature `codeToHtml(code: string, options: CodeToHastOptions<BundledLanguage,BundledTheme>) => Promise<string>` per dist/bundle-full.d.mts:22, with lang+theme as the real option keys (codeToTokensBase RequireKeys 'theme'|'lang'). Schema fields code/lang/theme map 1:1 to the API. Isolation: +esm shows 0 document.head, 0 createElement('style'), 0 document/window addEventListener, 0 adoptedStyleSheets — output HTML carries inline styles, no head injection, fully shadow-safe DOM-wise. shadowCompatible=conditional only because default bundle initializes Oniguruma WebAssembly, so host CSP/capabilities must permit WASM (honestly disclosed in entry).
